role: Python/FastAPI requirements management, API spec authoring and validation

api_spec_authoring.description: Author and maintain OpenAPI contract as single source of truth

tools.FastAPI_native_OpenAPI: FastAPI auto-generates OpenAPI 3.1 from Pydantic models — spec IS the code
tools.Pydantic_v2: Foundation of FastAPI — all request/response models, validation, serialization (5-50x faster than v1)

api_spec_authoring.method: API-first design: define Pydantic models first, FastAPI generates spec, Flutter consumes

spec_validation.description: Ensure API spec quality and consistency

tools.Spectral: OpenAPI linting — enforces naming conventions, required fields, consistent error formats
tools.Redocly_CLI: OpenAPI bundling, linting, and documentation generation

breaking_change_detection.description: Detect breaking changes on every PR

tools.openapi_diff: Diff spec versions, flag breaking changes for Master_Orchestrator

domain_driven_design.method: Aggregates, value objects, entities — each domain module is self-contained

tools.Pydantic_v2: Domain model definition with validation and serialization

tools.Schemathesis: Auto-generates API tests FROM OpenAPI spec — finds edge cases humans miss

semantic_versioning.method: Semantic versioning (v1, v2 prefixes), breaking changes trigger major version bump
